name: Pumpkin Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, mashed pumpkin, cornstarch, pumpkin pie spice, and evaporated milk in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture forms a soft ball when dropped in cold water or reaches 235°F on a candy thermometer.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla, butter, and chopped pecans until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered baking dish and allow to cool completely.
5. Cut into small squares once the fudge has nearly cooled.
